description: Standard roster-extension fanout — four wave 41 BFZ cards attach to existing character nodes. Shadow Glider, Tandem Tactics, Unified Front all anchor at [[kor]] per oracle/flavor/visual canonical identifiers; Smite the Monstrous dual-anchors at both [[eldrazi]] (depicted titan target) and [[kor]] (depicted rope-and-cable attackers). Tandem Tactics needed the characters: ['kor'] frontmatter wired (previously missing); Smite the Monstrous needed characters: ['eldrazi', 'kor'] wired. All four cards now have ## Connections body sections with brief 1-sentence + 1-cite entries per the museum-curation discipline. Kor.md and eldrazi.md appears_on lists extended; bodies extended with new bullets; caveats updated to note BFZ-coverage-complete status. Sighing through the fanout but the BFZ block kor + eldrazi adversary structure now has its strongest single-frame anchor in Smite the Monstrous, which is the rare card where both sides of the conflict appear at recognizable scale in the same composition. Makindi Patrol (BFZ-39, mounted patrolman) and Ondu Greathorn (BFZ-40, megafauna beast) were considered for kor.md attachment and REJECTED — Makindi Patrol's depicted rider has no kor-specific visual identifier (no pale hair, no hook-cord gear; could be human Stone-Havens sentinel), and Ondu Greathorn is a Beast creature subtype with no humanoid figure in art. Neither belongs at the kor node.
citations: Scryfall: BFZ-47 Shadow Glider (type_line: Creature — Kor Spirit; flavor refugee-bands-in-the-caves)
Scryfall: BFZ-52 Tandem Tactics flavor (strike in unison)
Scryfall: BFZ-53 Unified Front (Converge oracle + community flavor)
Scryfall: BFZ-49 Smite the Monstrous (Gideon-watching-kor flavor + destroy-power-4-or-greater oracle)
MTG Wiki: Kor (canonical visual identifiers: pale hair + hook-cord climbing gear)
MTG Wiki: Battle for Zendikar (block design framework: kor-versus-Eldrazi adversary structure)

cards/_characters/eldrazi.md (appears_on +Smite the Monstrous; body bullet for Smite the Monstrous; BFZ-coverage caveat added)
